effect_universe.dataset: marson2025_gwcd4_perturbseq (Genome-scale perturb-seq, primary human CD4+ T cells; bioRxiv 2025.12.23.696273)

programs.coefficient_scheme: score_genes uniform: +1/n_panel_measured per panel gene, -1/n_control per control gene
programs.scoring_method: score_genes: panel mean minus expression-bin-matched control mean (25 bins, ctrl_size 50), SEED=12345

display_transform.selection_rule: p50 maps to 0.5; upper anchor = first stored quantile in [p75,p90,p95,p98,p99] strictly greater than p50; monotonic; degenerate when no upper tail exists

programs.source_citation: Masopust et al., Guidelines for T cell nomenclature, Nat Rev Immunol 2026;26:298-313
